title: VIJAY THALAPATHY'S TVK WIN | SUVENDU ADHIKARI PA SHOT | TATA TRUSTS MEETING - MAY 7, 2026
description:
Get the biggest news updates from India and around the world in just 3 minutes. In today’s news roundup, we cover major updates on Tamil Nadu politics, TVK chief Vijay’s government formation request, Governor Rajendra Arlekar’s decision, post-election violence in West Bengal, Suvendu Adhikari’s PA Chandranath Rath murder case, Mamata Banerjee’s resignation controversy, Tata Trusts board meeting, Tata Sons leadership discussion, 8th Central Pay Commission update, Trump’s Project Freedom, the Strait of Hormuz crisis, India-Vietnam relations, and the LSG vs RCB IPL 2026 match.

Follow for daily updates on latest India news, breaking news, current affairs, politics, business, stock market, international affairs, and sports explained in a simple and easy-to-understand way.
